discriminators.title: Clinical Discriminators
discriminators.highScoreWarning: TEWS score is {{score}} but no RED discriminator is selected — please review.

airway-obstruction.name: Airway obstruction
airway-obstruction.description: Complete or partial obstruction of the airway compromising breathing.

severe-bleeding.name: Severe bleeding
severe-bleeding.description: Uncontrolled or heavy hemorrhage with risk of hypovolemic shock.

unconsciousness.name: Unconsciousness
unconsciousness.description: Patient is unresponsive or has a significantly reduced level of consciousness.

severe-pain.name: Severe pain (≥8/10)
severe-pain.description: Patient reports pain of 8 or higher on a 10-point pain scale.

abnormal-rhythm.name: Abnormal rhythm
abnormal-rhythm.description: Irregular or abnormal cardiac rhythm detected.

results.title: Triage Classification
results.escalatedFrom: Escalated from {{level}} (TEWS score only) due to selected discriminator(s).
results.completePrompt: Complete patient vitals to see the triage result.
results.calculationError: Something went wrong calculating the TEWS score. Please check the vitals and try again.
